project_reference.core_research_question: How do we turn the Zer0pa website into a deterministic geometry program whose layout, typography, color, semantic hierarchy, packet truth, and code quality are governed by explicit laws and falsified continuously until canonical closure is reached?
project_reference.current_focus: Make GGD contract artifacts actively govern CLAW route execution, downstream acceptance, and route-gap closure.

decisive_outputs: canonical routes with zero critical and zero major geometry failures
a convention lock that prevents creative drift
verification bundles that cover geometry, truth, semantic, SEO, contrast, and code quality
a product-family kernel proven on more than one repo-backed page
an autonomy layer that can recurse without degrading quality
forbidden_moves: route-specific hacks inside the shared product kernel
flattening IMC flagship behavior into generic route logic
bypassing packet truth to hide weak data
declaring autonomy readiness while route failures are still unmodeled

position.current_phase_name: Wire runtime route gates and deterministic gap closure
position.last_activity_desc: Wired route-level bundle governance, gap export, gap closure, downstream acceptance blocking, and a first geometry-law audit into the autonomy layer.

open_questions: Which GGD command surface should be wired first into the Codex execution layer?
Should GGD state become the direct upstream input for CLAW runtime-state promotion decisions?
Which existing audits should be reclassified into named GGD verification bundles first?

decisions.summary: Adapt GPD more literally as GGD instead of keeping only GPD-inspired prose doctrine.
decisions.rationale: The current system copied evaluator-optimizer behavior but not enough of the stronger GPD structure: state, conventions, protocol catalog, and verification contract.

decisions.summary: Keep CLAW as the autonomy layer and install GGD as the deterministic contract layer.
decisions.rationale: Runner orchestration and design contract are separate responsibilities and should remain separate.

pending_todos: Add explicit FT route-gap export once the first FT falsification exists.
Promote the geometry-law audit into the systems-qa lane acceptance recipe.
Expose the named bundle entrypoints directly in the ggd-* command surface.
blockers: XR remains blocked by an open deterministic geometry gap.
Press-go remains false until supervised and guarded autonomy proofs are complete.

/imc.summary: flagship IMC accepted through canonical closure

/work/xr.summary: Rejected: fresh XR falsification still fails the phase acceptance rule with `14` critical layout diffs; IMC flagship invariants remain intact and XR responsive overflow is clear.

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Hero regions should resolve from explicit ratio families per route role instead of implicit current widths, so flagship and product-family pages preserve identity under the same mathematical system.
measured_checks: hero split ratios stay inside approved families
hero authority and identity blocks remain aligned at all declared breakpoints

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Section transitions should be governed by a declared vertical-flow law so macro spacing and sectional density can be improved without introducing local hacks.
measured_checks: section offsets remain on the spacing ladder
macro section movement is attributable to declared law changes

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Baseline rhythm and line-length control should be made explicit so density, legibility, and mathematical proportionality improve together rather than by visual compromise.
measured_checks: type roles map cleanly to the modular scale
critical headings preserve intended line breaks and readable line lengths

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Foreground, surface, rule, and accent tokens should be governed by explicit numeric relationships so color behavior is algebraic and contrast-safe rather than taste-driven.
measured_checks: token luminance deltas remain declared and inspectable
accent-soft and secondary text remain derived instead of hand-tuned

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Responsive behavior should be treated as explicit limiting cases, including larger displays, so routes do not merely avoid overflow but preserve geometric intent across dimensions.
measured_checks: no overflow across expanded viewport set
hero and metric regions preserve lawful proportionality on wide displays

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Visual depth, overlay ordering, and emphasis should be encoded as a limited dimensional system so perceived hierarchy follows declared structure rather than ad hoc layering.
measured_checks: elevated surfaces use declared depth roles only
z-order and emphasis do not contradict semantic priority

augmentation_backlog.hypothesis: Semantic hierarchy and DOM depth should be simplified where possible so content management, SEO, and inspection quality improve without changing route truth.
measured_checks: main landmark and heading hierarchy remain valid
no unnecessary wrapper nesting in route-critical regions
